Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Whew! It's so hot, I almost burned myself![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 0 25 25}I remember one time my dad burned his mouth on this stuff![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}...'Cause I put too many in his mouth at once.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}...Dad hasn't been coming home much these days.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Do you think he'll come home and see me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}My mom always gives me presents on my birthday.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}{f 4 23 0 110 2 25 25}But she hasn't asked me what I want this year yet...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}If they really loved me, they wouldn't get a divorce.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}You're the only one who spends time with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko seems to have taken a liking to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like we're growing closer...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Oh, I have to go home! Today's laundry day.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 110 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}If I don't do laundry, the house gets really messy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Maiko headed off, and I[n]returned to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
